# Cloudflare Bypass Dependencies

# Python 3.12+ 需要 setuptools (distutils 已移除)
setuptools>=69.0.0

# Selenium with undetected-chromedriver
undetected-chromedriver>=3.5.0
selenium>=4.15.0

# PyAutoGUI for OS-level mouse control
pyautogui>=0.9.54

# Additional dependencies for PyAutoGUI on Linux
python-xlib>=0.33
Pillow>=10.0.0

# For JSON output
# (built-in json module is sufficient)
